description: Intent-only request: classify lead scoring and fixed follow-up branches as hybrid.

text: When a new lead arrives, score how promising it is from the message and company, then notify sales if it's high and send a nurture email if it's low.

processExpectations: The agent classifies the lead scoring request as a hybrid workflow.
The agent explains that AI can provide the bounded promising-lead score.
The agent explains that the high and low follow-up paths are deterministic branches.
The agent does not classify the request as a full agent because the action set is fixed.

executionScenarios.name: intent-only-response
executionScenarios.description: The agent should only classify intent; no executable workflow is expected
executionScenarios.dataSetup: No external data is required because this scenario is an intent-classification prompt.
executionScenarios.successCriteria: The response classifies the request as hybrid and separates scoring from deterministic routing.
